description: The rover shall not run out of battery
Charging station location shall be static
Charging station shall be selected as the next destination whenever the recharge flag is set to true
Battery monitor shall show battery charge 5% lower than currently estimated
The interface recharge output shall be set to true when the current battery charge is lower than battery needed to reach the charging station from the current position plus 5% battery charge.
Once at charging station, rover shall remain there until battery reaches full charge.
Each step in the plan shall not use more than 1/n amount of battery
The rover shall not collide with an obstacle
Initial rover position shall be static
Current rover position shall be accurate
The vision subsystem shall ensure that the initial current rover position as recognised by the Vision is equal to the static initial position
The Vision subsystem shall ensure that the current position is not a position with an obstacle
The path to the next destination shall be calculated from the current rover position
All obstacles shall be correctly identified
An obstacle shall not be in the location of the initial rover position
An obstacle shall not be in the location of the charging station
An obstacle shall not be in the same location as a heatpoint
The calculated path to destination shall not include a location with an obstacle
Rover shall not go faster than 10kmph
The rover shall visit all reachable heatpoints
All heatpoints shall be correctly identified
A valid heatpoint position shall not be the same as the initial rover position
A valid heatpoint position shall not be the same as the charging station position
A valid heatpoint shall not be on the same location as a valid obstacle
Visited heatpoint shall be removed from the list of destinations to visit
benchmark_ltl: ((G (((! atGoal) & (X atGoal)) -> (X (((G[0,1] (! removeGoalFromSet)) | (G (! removeGoalFromSet))) & (F[0,2] removeGoalFromSet))))) & (atGoal -> (((G[0,1] (! removeGoalFromSet)) | (G (! removeGoalFromSet))) & (F[0,2] removeGoalFromSet))))

description: The hotest heatpoint that was not visited before shall be the current goal when recharge flag is false
The shortest path to the current goal shall be selected
The interface subsystem shall set atGoal flag to true only when the current rover position is equal to the current goal position
